items.title: Fulu -- Polynomial Commitments Sampling
items.description: Extends polynomial-commitments with DAS functions. Defines Cell type (64 field elements), CELLS_PER_EXT_BLOB=128, compute_cells_and_kzg_proofs, verify_cell_kzg_proof_batch, recover_cells_and_kzg_proofs. Includes FFT helpers, KZG multiproofs, and reconstruction algorithms.

items.title: Fulu -- Honest Validator
items.description: Honest validator guide for Fulu. Defines VALIDATOR_CUSTODY_REQUIREMENT=8, BALANCE_PER_ADDITIONAL_CUSTODY_GROUP=32 ETH, modified BlobsBundle with cell KZG proofs, get_data_column_sidecars construction, sidecar publishing and retention requirements.
